final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a WeChat Official Account article cover promoting "染秋" fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: premium editorial poster design, sophisticated luxury aesthetic, clean typography-focused layout
Composition: centered composition with headline as the dominant focal point, generous negative space around text block
Subject: elegant Chinese typography "染秋" as primary title, with secondary tagline "秋意染染 时光留香" positioned beneath
Scene/backdrop: minimalist abstract autumn atmosphere, subtle warm gradient or textured paper background suggesting fall warmth
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light, refined and contemplative mood evoking autumn nostalgia
Color palette: warm amber and terracotta as base, muted cream or off-white for text, subtle gold or bronze as accent
Text (verbatim): "染秋" / "秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: headline must be immediately readable at thumbnail size; maintain visual hierarchy with title > tagline > product context
Avoid: cluttered elements, multiple competing fonts, stock photo aesthetics, 8K stuffer language, overly decorative borders
